Start in strict execution mode.

Protocol
1. Read SPEC/03-architecture.md, SPEC/04-data-model.md, SPEC/06-decisions.md first.
2. Propose minimal architecture delta.
3. Mark explicit decisions requiring user approval.
4. Update SPEC/03-architecture.md and SPEC/07-change-log.md for accepted deltas.
5. Record decisions in SPEC/06-decisions.md.
